title: Appendix #A-8 ORS Deposit Search Results Grid
body_text:
Appendix #A-8	ORS Deposit Search Results Grid
Column Name
Column Description
Format
A
Action
P ГўВЂВ“ Print image of item
T ГўВЂВ“ View transactions (cheques) within deposit
S ГўВЂВ“ Search for cheques within deposit
V
View
Checkbox
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Example: 12340809
Date
Date deposit is credited to financial institution account at Central 1
Mmm dd yyyy, Example: Jan 05 2005
Amount
Dollar amount of deposit
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
Currency
Currency
CAD ГўВЂВ“ Canadian Dollar
USD ГўВЂВ“ US Dollar
Trace #
Deposit Trace Number
10 digits
TranCode
Transaction Code
See
Appendix #A-10
, ORS Transaction Codes
